title: micromeria fruticosa
intro: Micromeria fruticosa, also known as Greek mountain tea, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which may contribute to its potential health benefits. Consuming Greek mountain tea has been associated with reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the leaves are steeped in hot water to make a tea, and the plant is also used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties.
